_meta.doctrine: Paper 38 — Individual deep dive before committee consensus
_meta.key_insight: Committees produce mean scores. Individuals find domain-specific bugs via binary checks.
_meta.use_when: Pre-ship correctness/security/performance audit by a single domain expert

context_injection.skill_selection_rule: Load prime-safety always. Add domain_skills based on audit target. Max 3 domain skills.

checks.llm_verdict_required: INDIVIDUAL_PASS or list of bugs with file:line
